final:
// // Asynchronous reset sets Q to 1 when active
module t_flip_flop (
    input wire T,
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    output reg Q
);
    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            Q <= 0;
        end else if (T) begin
            Q <= ~Q; // toggle Q
        end
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // Asynchronous reset sets Q to 1 when active
